stale_ec2_risk.risk: EC2 /home/ubuntu/Comfy_UI_Main still contains an older three-lane runtime queue where Canny can appear queued, while local C:\Comfy_UI_Main contains the newer nine-lane queue and newer selected-inpaint readiness evidence.
stale_ec2_risk.impact: Any agent or script using the EC2 project copy as planning authority could resurrect completed Canny/base/fallback work.
stale_ec2_risk.mitigation: Use local C:\Comfy_UI_Main hydration, local runtime-lane queue, local QA evidence, and local Tracker evidence as the execution ledger. Treat EC2 files as runtime evidence/cache only.

completed_work_do_not_rerun: sdxl_realvisxl_base_lane RealVisXL base smoke/proof and prior certification sample runs
sdxl_realvisxl_controlnet_canny_lane baseline/Canny v4 target-runtime smoke proof
2026-07-09 local package smoke and visual QA matrix evidence for active base-generation lanes
still_open_not_duplicate_when_gated: selected inpaint clean deploy-bundle rebuild/revalidation from local source
selected S3 publish proof for deploy bundle/input/model assets
selected EC2 input/model install hash proof
main_session_rule: Main session must not plan from /home/ubuntu/Comfy_UI_Main. If EC2 and local disagree, use local as authority and classify the EC2 copy as EC2_WORKSPACE_STALE_NOT_AUTHORITY.
cron_rule: Scheduled cron jobs must check the local source-of-truth protocol before steering EC2/runtime work and must not report stale EC2 queue state as current project queue state.
